Description: Tao family don gian (box, cylinder, L-shape): params, geometry, types, save.

Use_When: task yeu cau tao family moi tu template
family chi co 1-2 geometry forms (extrusion, revolution)
family khong can nested family phuc tap
geometry la box, cylinder, L-shape, hoac dang co ban
Dont_Use_When: family co geometry phuc tap (lofted, adaptive, swept blend)
can nhieu nested family voi type mapping
task yeu cau parametric geometry voi constraints phuc tap
DecisionGate.Prefer_Over: script.run_safe — khi geometry don gian du de dung bridge tools. Bridge tools an toan hon vi co dry-run/approval flow.

Steps.Purpose: Xac nhan family template dung category, kiem tra params co san va existing geometry.
Steps.Verify: CategoryName matches expected, TypesCount va ParametersCount visible.

Steps.Purpose: Add cac dimension parameters (Width, Height, Length) va material parameter.
Steps.Verify: family.xray shows new parameters in ParametersCount.

Steps.Purpose: Tao ref planes cho geometry constraints — Center Left/Right, Center Front/Back.
Steps.Condition: Chi can neu template chua co ref plane phu hop cho geometry constraints.

Steps.Purpose: Tao solid extrusion geometry tu profile.
Steps.Verify: family.list_geometry shows new form with correct mode (Solid/Void).

Steps.Purpose: Gan subcategory cho visibility control trong project.
Steps.Condition: Neu family can subcategory rieng (vd: Body, Frame, Accessories).

Steps.Purpose: Lien ket geometry dimensions voi parameters qua formula.
Tao family types voi parameter values cu the.

QcStep.ExpectedOutcome: TypesCount >= 2, ParametersCount >= 4, co geometry forms trong family.list_geometry.
